title: Supplemental Material for Paper 'Taxonomy Extraction Using Knowledge Graph Embeddings and Hierarchical Clustering'
author: Félix Martel
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Contains input data and gold standard for the non-expressive extraction task, as well as examples of extracted taxonomies for both the non-expressive and expressive cases. Extracted taxonomies can also be found at  labowest.ca .
steps_raw: Contains input data and gold standard for the non-expressive extraction task, as well as examples of extracted taxonomies for both the non-expressive and expressive cases. Extracted taxonomies can also be found at  labowest.ca .
